history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A person wearing inline skates is crouched on a paved plaza at night while other people stand and sit farther back near illuminated structures.

Main Subject:
In the foreground, a person with short dark hair and black-framed glasses crouches on gray stone pavement while holding one black roller skate with their hand. They wear a black sleeveless top with a light-colored graphic across the chest and black pants, and their head is tilted downward as they look at the skate or their hands.

Setting:
The scene takes place outdoors at night on a wide open plaza with large, flat stone tiles. Bright ground-level lights and tall, lit structures in the background cast warm illumination. Several other people are visible in the distance near a low platform and a blue-edged rectangular area, with more lights and trees lining the far background.

Visual Details:
The lighting is strong and directional, creating a clear shadow of the crouching person on the pavement. The skates are black with gray wheels and a textured frame. In the midground, a low platform with multiple warm light sources rises above the pavement, and a person stands near it. Another person sits farther to the right on the pavement, facing downward toward something in their hands. The plaza is mostly empty aside from a few figures, and the composition is shot from a slightly elevated, front-facing angle focused on the foreground person.

Visible Text:
No important visible text detected.

Practical Summary:
The image shows a person crouching on a nighttime outdoor plaza while adjusting or holding a black inline skate. Other people appear in the background near lit structures and a blue-edged area.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):

Pertanyaan asli user: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young Asian man with short black hair and glasses, wearing a sleeveless black t-shirt with "YESZY" printed on it in white and black pants, sits on a paved ground with his legs extended and wearing black inline skates. He is in the foreground, slightly off-center to the left, with his left hand resting on his knee. The background shows a public square at night, illuminated by streetlights and artificial lighting from a building in the distance. Several people are scattered across the square, some walking, some sitting, and some appearing to be on rollerblades or skateboards. In the mid-ground, there are blue barriers set up on the ground, possibly for an event or a skating area. Trees line the edge of the square, and a tall, illuminated structure, possibly a monument or a building, stands in the far background. The overall lighting is dim and atmospheric, with strong shadows cast by the man and the surrounding objects. The color palette is dominated by dark tones of gray, black, and the warm yellow and orange of the artificial lights, with some muted colors from the clothing of people in the background. The mood is relaxed and casual, suggesting a late-night hangout or practice session. The image has a slightly grainy, low-light quality, reminiscent of a candid photograph taken with a smartphone.
